conditions: 6 AM—Get on up, Jackson Hole. You don't want to waste the day because it's the final one of February 2026. Come send it off with a proper blast of big-mountain fun. We'll be dancing under blazing blue skies and a sparkling mirror-ball sun this morning before high afternoon clouds dim the lights down low. Warm temperatures will help tenderize the dance floor as they zoom into the mid-20s at the summit and the mid-40s in the Village. A cool west breeze will blow between 5 and 20 mph on most of the mountain, while the high ridgelines could see gusts that hit the 40 mph mark. After your day of elevated sun-sations in the snow, you don't have to slip down into stagnation. Hit the Tram Dock après show for tunes and libations to sustain your hip gyrations. -Lege
